'''lofadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kleptoplastidic|kleptoplastidic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kleptoplastidic|kleptoplastidic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lofadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofadithi|lofadithi]] || [[word:lofadiji|lofadiji]] || [[word:lofadishi|lofadishi]] || [[word:lofadiki|lofadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofaduthuthu|lofaduthuthu]] || [[word:lofadujuju|lofadujuju]] || [[word:lofadushushu|lofadushushu]] || [[word:lofadukuku|lofadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofaduthu|lofaduthu]] || [[word:lofaduju|lofaduju]] || [[word:lofadushu|lofadushu]] || [[word:lofaduku|lofaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofadufthuf|lofadufthuf]] || [[word:lofadufjuf|lofadufjuf]] || [[word:lofadufshuf|lofadufshuf]] || [[word:lofadufkuf|lofadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofadethe|lofadethe]] || [[word:lofadeje|lofadeje]] || [[word:lofadeshe|lofadeshe]] || [[word:lofadeke|lofadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofadothotho|lofadothotho]] || [[word:lofadojojo|lofadojojo]] || [[word:lofadoshosho|lofadoshosho]] || [[word:lofadokoko|lofadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofadotho|lofadotho]] || [[word:lofadojo|lofadojo]] || [[word:lofadosho|lofadosho]] || [[word:lofadoko|lofadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofadofthof|lofadofthof]] || [[word:lofadofjof|lofadofjof]] || [[word:lofadofshof|lofadofshof]] || [[word:lofadofkof|lofadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofadïfthïf|lofadïfthïf]] || [[word:lofadïfjïf|lofadïfjïf]] || [[word:lofadïfshïf|lofadïfshïf]] || [[word:lofadïfkïf|lofadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofadïfthïfthïf|lofadïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:lofadïfjïfjïf|lofadïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:lofadïfshïfshïf|lofadïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:lofadïfkïfkïf|lofadïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofadïfthïf|lofadïfthïf]] || [[word:lofadïfjïf|lofadïfjïf]] || [[word:lofadïfshïf|lofadïfshïf]] || [[word:lofadïfkïf|lofadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofadïfthïf|lofadïfthïf]] || [[word:lofadïfjïf|lofadïfjïf]] || [[word:lofadïfshïf|lofadïfshïf]] || [[word:lofadïfkïf|lofadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lofadæthæ|lofadæthæ]] || [[word:lofadæjæ|lofadæjæ]] || [[word:lofadæshæ|lofadæshæ]] || [[word:lofadækæ|lofadækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lofadathatha|lofadathatha]] || [[word:lofadajaja|lofadajaja]] || [[word:lofadashasha|lofadashasha]] || [[word:lofadakaka|lofadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lofadatha|lofadatha]] || [[word:lofadaja|lofadaja]] || [[word:lofadasha|lofadasha]] || [[word:lofadaka|lofadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lofadafthaf|lofadafthaf]] || [[word:lofadafjaf|lofadafjaf]] || [[word:lofadafshaf|lofadafshaf]] || [[word:lofadafkaf|lofadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lofadasha|lofadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofadshësha|lofadshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofadrosha|lofadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofadmusha|lofadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofadyasha|lofadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofadnkshësha|golofadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofadnkrosha|golofadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofadnkmusha|golofadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofadnkyasha|golofadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lofafadasha|lofafadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofafadshësha|lofafadshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofafadrosha|lofafadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofafadmusha|lofafadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofafadyasha|lofafadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofafadnkshësha|golofafadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofafadnkrosha|golofafadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofafadnkmusha|golofafadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofafadnkyasha|golofafadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lefædasha|lefædasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lefædshësha|lefædshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lefædrosha|lefædrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lefædmusha|lefædmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lefædyasha|lefædyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golefædnkshësha|golefædnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golefædnkrosha|golefædnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golefædnkmusha|golefædnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golefædnkyasha|golefædnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lofadasha|lofadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lofadshësha|lofadshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lofadrosha|lofadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lofadmusha|lofadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lofadyasha|lofadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golofadnkshësha|golofadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golofadnkrosha|golofadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golofadnkmusha|golofadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golofadnkyasha|golofadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
